---
title: Region Year
subtitle: Pacific Herring preliminary data summary
region: Haida Gwaii
major: true
author:
  - Matthew Grinnell^[DFO science, matthew.grinnell@dfo-mpo.gc.ca]
  - Jaclyn Cleary^[DFO science, jaclyn.cleary@dfo-mpo.gc.ca]
date: "`r format(lubridate::today(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
knit: bookdown::render_book
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output:
  pdf_document:
    number_sections: true
    includes:
      in_header: doc/preamble.tex
      before_body: doc/prefix.tex
      after_body: doc/suffix.tex
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{float}
---

```{r setup, echo = FALSE, cache = FALSE, message = FALSE, results = 'hide', warning = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(rmarkdown)
library(bookdown)
library(lubridate)
library(knitr)

theme_set(theme_bw())

knitr_figs_dir <- "knitr-figs-pdf/"
knitr_cache_dir <- "knitr-cache-pdf/"
fig_out_type <- "pdf"

fig_asp <- 0.618
fig_width <- 6.5
fig_out_width <- "6.5in"
fig_dpi <- 320
fig_align <- "center"
fig_pos <- "ht"
opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = knitr_figs_dir,
  cache.path = knitr_cache_dir,
  fig.asp = fig_asp,
  fig.width = fig_width,
  out.width = fig_out_width,
  echo = FALSE,
  cache.comments = FALSE,
  dev = fig_out_type,
  dpi = fig_dpi,
  fig.align = fig_align,
  fig.pos = "H",
  dev = "png"
)

options(
  xtable.comment = FALSE,
  kableExtra.latex.load_packages = FALSE,
  width = 80,
  scipen = 999,
  dplyr.summarise.inform = FALSE,
  ggrepel.max.overlaps = Inf
)
```

```{r metadata, echo = FALSE}
title_new <- paste(metadata$region, year(today()))
```

---
title: `r title_new`
---
